fallbacks.subagents: Sequential self-review in a fresh context window: re-read the task brief and the exact base..head diff package with no implementation context carried over. This is a degraded substitute and MUST NOT be reported as equivalent to an independent reviewer.
fallbacks.task_tracking: Track task state in .wcbs/runs/<run-id>/progress-ledger.jsonl instead of a native task list.
fallbacks.web_access: Require the human to supply source material; record the evidence state as Unknown rather than guessing.
fallbacks.browser_verification: Substitute command-line verification (curl, HTTP status, scripted DOM snapshot) and record rendered-UI evidence as Not Run.
fallbacks.durable_artifact_storage: Write durable artifacts to the project-local .wcbs/runs/<run-id>/ tree on the filesystem.
fallbacks.human_approval_gates: Halt, print the exact pending action, and require an explicit human reply before proceeding.

supported_runtime_versions: Any LLM agent with file read, write, edit, and command execution
install: Attach START_HERE.md, SOURCE_OF_TRUTH.md, LOAD_ORDER.md, and AUDIT_TIER_ROUTER.md at the start of every session.
uninstall: Stop attaching the files. Nothing is installed.
rollback: Attach the prior revision of the kit files.
limitations: No native mechanism places the kit in context automatically, so this is Manual by definition. If command execution is unavailable, the runtime is Unsupported.
